scripts.test:theme-coverage: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('./.node-coverage-build',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('./.node-coverage-build',{recursive:true});" && tsc src/themeVisuals.ts --rootDir src --outDir ./.node-coverage-build --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Node --target ES2022 --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop && node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include=./.node-coverage-build/themeVisuals.js --test-coverage-lines=90 --test-coverage-functions=90 --test-coverage-branches=90 node-tests/themeVisuals.coverage.node-test.cjs
scripts.start:all:e2e: concurrently "npm run dev" "npm --prefix ../gateway start" "cross-env JWT_SECRET=e2e-test-secret MONGO_AUTH_DB=mongodb://localhost:27017/auth npm --prefix ../auth_service start"
